title: Math foundation depends only on NumPy + stdlib
OpenCV confined to detection and IO adapters
rationale: Keep the solver/geometry path NumPy-native and portable

title: Analytic Jacobians only (no autodiff dependency)
rationale: Speed and stability; avoid heavy ML frameworks in core

title: Examples and demos run on small (<10 GB) public data on a laptop
rationale: Keep the project reproducible without special hardware

title: No internal R&D / AI-process content in tracked files
rationale: Protect the local research process and private terms

title: Releases published only via release-please + PyPI OIDC trusted publishing
